transcript: This is the latest piece I'm working on at the moment. It's called a pangolin and as you can see it's very scaly. The scales begin at the tip of the tail, that would be the first one that's laid, and then it's like tiling a roof all the way up so I can't go back once it's done. This is a very rough underneath layer which allows me to put the scales on. It doesn't have to be especially well made. I have to finish
